name: Assertion-free test: CelestialCelebration animated path
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-04] empty test body; comment admits onComplete 'may still be called' under the runOnJS mock. Fix: redesign mock so the assertion can be made, or delete with TODO citing the mock limitation.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the CelestialCelebration animated-path test has an empty assertion body because the current Reanimated/runOnJS mock may invoke onComplete immediately, so the test gives false confidence. Variants: reduced-motion path remains covered; animated path either redesigns the mock so onComplete can be asserted, or removes the assertion-free test with a TODO citing the mock limitation. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/components/common/celebrations/CelestialCelebration.test.tsx no longer contains an assertion-free animated-path test and fails before the chosen correction, passes after.
